steps.title: Use the trend direction
steps.content: The scatterplot trends downward from left to right, so the linear model should have a negative slope. This eliminates the choices with positive slope.

steps.title: Match the intercept
steps.content:
The data are centered around a negative $y$-intercept near $-14.7$, and the slope is about $-10$. The matching model is
$$y=-14.7-10x$$
The answer is C.
